chosen_action.title: Legacy distribution-architecture repair logs still count toward third-strike churn suppression

result.summary: Patched distribution_lane_selector.py so fingerprintless legacy distribution_architecture_repair logs still count toward same-window repeat detection while guard/follow-through artifacts remain fingerprint-strict. This restores truthful third-strike escalation instead of letting the selector fall through to exhausted post-hold repair messaging.

tests.note: Two failures were present in execution-board packet surfacing/reschedule coverage unrelated to the selector repeat-count patch.

verification.execution_board_truth: No do-now handoff packet is currently truthful in this review window.
verification.targeted_fix_reason: Current truthful work was runtime/process repair because Codeberg adoption is flat, the board is empty, Apollo is already inside a live measurement window until 2026-06-02T07:23:34.700335+02:00, and duplicate/redundant packet regeneration would be fake progress.
